name: North of Tent
description: A path north of the tent leads from the tent to the mountain. There are prints leading to the inside of the tent.
ambient: A cool breeze blows from the north.
The prints are clear in the soft earth.
A few wildflowers grow near the tent's canvas.

interaction_rules.text: The prints are small—a child or a halfling—and lead from the tent to the mountain path. They look recent.
You pluck a small blue flower. It smells faintly of rain.
Your voice drifts through the area and fades into the distance. No one applauds, but it lifts your spirits.
